creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Sat Jan 18 02:49:11 2014
New Revision: 340145
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/340145
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r340145/

Log:
  - Update from 1.13 to 1.14
  
  PR:		ports/185699
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>

Modified:
  head/games/mahjong/Makefile
  head/games/mahjong/distinfo

Modified: head/games/mahjong/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/mahjong/Makefile	Sat Jan 18 02:49:02 2014	(r340144)
+++ head/games/mahjong/Makefile	Sat Jan 18 02:49:11 2014	(r340145)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	mahjong
-PORTVERSION=	1.13
+PORTVERSION=	1.14
 CATEGORIES=	games net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://mahjong.julianbradfield.org/Source/%SUBDIR%/
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	. Old
@@ -33,6 +33,9 @@ post-patch:
 		 s|^INST|#INST|g ; \
 		 s|make |$$(MAKE) |g' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|"gcc"|"${CC}"| ; \
+		 s|^gcc |${CC} |' ${WRKSRC}/makedep
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
 		's|SOL_TCP|IPPROTO_TCP|' ${WRKSRC}/sysdep.c
 
 do-configure:

Modified: head/games/mahjong/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/games/mahjong/distinfo	Sat Jan 18 02:49:02 2014	(r340144)
+++ head/games/mahjong/distinfo	Sat Jan 18 02:49:11 2014	(r340145)
